rulings.Case Title: THEDA FUNG VS. SUSANA MANCIA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For A Protective Order; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof; Declaration Of Counsel; Proof Of Service
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 27, 2017 line 1. DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A's Motion For A Protective Order Matter shall be heard in Dept. 301 on December 8, 2017 at 9:00 am. = (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: ORBELIAN HOLDINGS LP ET AL VS. 779 BUSH STREET LLC
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Discovery From Defendant Suheil Shatara
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 27, 2017 line 2. PLAINTIFFs ORBELIAN HOLDINGS LP and 797 BUSH STREET LP's Motion To Compel Discovery From Defendant Suheil Shatara Matter shall be heard in Dept. 301 on December 11, 2017 at 9:00 am. = (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: SOPHIE PAPPAS ET AL VS. ALEX MICHEL ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 27, 2017 line 3. DEFENDANT ALEX MICHEL's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED without leave to amend. Plaintiff failed to specifically plead the fraud claim and failed to state the manner in which the complaint could be amended and how that amendment will change the legal effect of the pleading. = (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: NASIR PATEL VS. KYLENE KLINKER ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice And Motion For Relief From Forfeiture; Memo Of Points And Authorities For Relief From Forfeture, Ccp 1179.
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 27, 2017 line 7. DEFENDANT KYLENE KLINKER's Motion For Relief From Forfeiture; CCP 1179. DENIED. Defendant has not met her burden under Code of Civil Procedure section 1179. = (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: PARK PRESIDIO UNITED METHODIST CHURCH VS. ELLEN BROTHERTON
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 27, 2017 line 4. DEFENDANT ELLEN BROTHERTON's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED. Plaintiff lacks capacity to sue. (Code Civ. Proc. § 430.10, subd. (b).) = (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: PARK PRESIDIO UNITED METHODIST CHURCH VS. ELLEN BROTHERTON
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 27, 2017 line 4. DEFENDANT ELLEN BROTHERTON's MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT DENIED. Plaintiff complied with Code of Civil Procedure section 446. = (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: GRINSELL GOLDEN GATE LLC VS. FELIPE J. PAXTOR CHAN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 27, 2017 line 5. PLAINTIFF GRINSELL GOLDEN GATE LLC's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT GRANTED. Plaintiff has met their burden of establishing a prima facie case for an unlawful detainer action based on section 37.9, subdivision (a)(7), of the San Francisco Residential Rent Stabilization and Arbitration Ordinance. = (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: MOSSER COMPANIES, INC. VS. SHARIKA ETHEART ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 27, 2017 line 6. DEFENDANT SHARIKA ETHEART's MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND GRANTED. Defendant has met her burden pursuant to Code of Civil Procedure section 473, subdivision (b). = (501/LOT)
